page_title: Vaultly: Personal Finance Mastery for the Modern Professional

hero.headline: Take Control of Your Financial Future
hero.subheadline: Vaultly empowers young professionals to transform financial stress into strategic wealth-building with intelligent, user-friendly personal finance management.
hero.image_prompt: Modern, sleek dashboard showing financial analytics, with a young professional using a laptop, soft blue and gray color palette, clean minimalist design, professional workspace background

features.title: Secure Your Future
features.description: Automated investment tracking and personalized growth strategies tailored to your unique financial goals. We analyze your spending, recommend smart savings plans, and project your long-term financial trajectory.
features.image_prompt: Futuristic financial planning visualization, holographic investment charts, young professional looking confident, soft technological blue and green tones

features.title: Smart Budgeting
features.description: Intelligent expense categorization that learns your spending patterns. Get real-time insights, automatic budget recommendations, and actionable tips to optimize your financial health without the complexity.
features.image_prompt: Interactive budget dashboard with colorful pie charts, money flow animations, minimalist design with clean lines, professional color scheme

features.title: Instant Insights
features.description: Comprehensive financial overview at your fingertips. Track investments, monitor cash flow, and receive predictive alerts about potential savings opportunities or financial risks before they impact you.
features.image_prompt: Dynamic financial insights screen, real-time data visualization, glowing analytics, modern tech-inspired design with deep blues and electric accents
